name: HRA_EVAL_RATINGS
description: This table stores the evaluation items and sections ratings

columns.Name: EVAL_RATING_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key of the Performance Rating

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to HR_ALL_ORGANIZATION_UNITS

columns.Name: EVALUATION_ID
columns.Comments: Foriegn key reference to HRA_EVALUATIONS table.

columns.Name: REFERENCE_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key to evaluation items (when REFERENCE_TYPE is ITEM) or to evaluation sections (when REFERENCE_TYPE is SECTION)

columns.Name: REFERENCE_TYPE
columns.Comments: Indiacates the type of entity being rated. Valid values are SECTION or ITEM

columns.Name: PERFORMANCE_RATING_ID
columns.Comments: Indicates the rating level for the performance. Uses performance rating model

columns.Name: PROFICIENCY_RATING_ID
columns.Comments: Indicates the rating level for the proficiency. Uses proficiency rating model

columns.Name: EVAL_PARTICIPANT_ID
columns.Comments: Any person, other than the employee/worker or manager, who participates in the performance evaluation business process.

columns.Name: REVIEW_POINTS
columns.Comments: Indicates the corresponding review points for the rating

columns.Name: CALCULATED_RATING
columns.Comments: Indicates the value of the rating calculated from fast formulas

columns.Name: COMMENTS
columns.Comments: Comments provided by the participant for an item or a section

columns.Name: ROLE_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Indicates which role type has given the rating

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: structure definition of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: COMMENT_TEXT
columns.Comments: Comments provided by the participant for an item or a section

columns.Name: JUSTIFICATION_TEXT
columns.Comments: Comments provided by Manager when manual rating and calculated rating are different.

columns.Name: JUSTIFICATION
columns.Comments: Comments provided by Manager when manual rating and calculated rating are different.
